title: NoobShulkerBoxes
description: NoobShulkerBoxes is a Minecraft plugin that allows players to open Shulker Boxes directly from their inventory without placing them down, making item management faster and more convenient. 🚀
body:
# NoobShulkerBoxes – Open Shulker Boxes from Your Inventory
NoobShulkerBoxes is a simple yet powerful Shulker Box utility for Bukkit-based servers, allowing players to open Shulker Boxes directly from their inventory without placing them down.

## 🔹 Features:
✔ Quick Access – Open Shulker Boxes by sneaking + left-clicking in the air        
✔ No Placing Needed – Browse and manage stored items without placing the box       
✔ Prevents Duplication Exploits – Safeguards against item duplication glitches     
✔ Barrier Placeholder – Temporarily replaces the Shulker Box while open          
✔ Automatic Save on Close – Inventory updates seamlessly when the GUI closes     
✔ **Toggleable ShulkerBox Feature** – Added the ability to toggle the Shulker Box feature on/off in the config.  
✔ **Config Support** – Now supports a configuration file for customization and management of settings.

## 🔹 How to Use:
1️⃣ Hold a Shulker Box in your main hand       
2️⃣ Sneak + Left-click in the air to open it          
3️⃣ Manage your items and close the inventory            
4️⃣ Your Shulker Box is returned with updated contents           

## 🔹 Installation:
1️⃣ Download NoobShulkerBoxes.jar and place it in your plugins folder                
2️⃣ Restart the server              
3️⃣ Start opening Shulker Boxes from your inventory!            

### 💡 Perfect for Survival & Economy Servers – Save time and manage storage with ease! 🚀
